series_metadata.series_description: Monthly and quarterly reports and records of ceiling allocations, revisions, advances, worksheets, and related documentation of ODHS administered state and federal funds allocated to an expended by county departments of human services.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: in office . ; Paper: 2 years in office ; Microform: in office 10 years or federal and state audits have been conducted, audit reports released, and audit resolutions issued or resolved. Duplicate set of microfilm be stored at and destroyed as above
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred ; Microform: Erase
